home.title: ASSA WAVE Investor Portal
home.subtitle: SAFT investor portal on Base. Connect your wallet to view your vesting schedule, lock $ASSA for veASSA voting weight, and claim vested tokens.

vesting.title: Your vesting schedules
vesting.subtitle: SAFT allocations are locked in TokenVesting until the cliff date, then release with the TGE portion plus linear vesting. Use Release to claim the currently-vested portion.
vesting.noSchedules: No vesting schedules found for this address.
vesting.released: Release confirmed. Tokens are in your wallet.

settings.title: Settings

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Sign a message with your wallet to view and manage your portal preferences.

email.title: Email notifications
email.description: Get notified when your ASSA cliff ends or new tokens are claimable.

settings.verifyError: Verification link is invalid or expired.
